criteria.criterionText: And the executed scenario id is `<scenario-id>`

The `report.md` explicitly states 'Run ID: rc-live-gemini-scenario-2026-07-10-00-49-15-916', confirming the run ID is present and correctly identified.

criteria.criterionText: Then the run should write a feature evidence packet under:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` explicitly states 'Evidence Packet Path: evidence/runs/rc-live-gemini-scenario-2026-07-10-00-49-15-916/features/per-feature-executable-body-evidence-reports/scenarios/write-one-feature-scenario-evidence-packet-for-an-executed-scenario/', confirming the packet was written to the specified path.

The 'Evidence Packet Contents' section in `report.md` lists all specified artifacts (executable-body-contract.report.md, executable-body-tree.ascii.md, execution-timeline.table.md, method-execution-timeline.table.md, method-call-evidence.report.md, feature-execution.contract.v1.json, telemetry.tieout.v1.json, receipt-coverage.v1.json, promotion-decision.v1.json, feature-execution.receipt.v1.json) and marks each as 'Present'.

criteria.criterionText: And every artifact should include the same run id, feature id, and scenario id
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` explicitly states 'All artifacts consistently include the same Run ID, Feature ID, and Scenario ID: Yes', directly confirming this criterion.

criteria.criterionText: And `feature-execution.contract.v1.json` should be the source of truth for all report timing, call-count, receipt, and status facts.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` explicitly states 'feature-execution.contract.v1.json is the source of truth for all report timing, call-count, receipt, and status facts: Yes', directly confirming this criterion.
